title: SSH Amazon EC2
author: Mihai IONITA

steps_raw.instruction: Select Instances , Actions, Instance State, Start (YES, Confirm) Copy IPv4 Public IP
Run software: Add: IPv4 Public IP and port 22 your .ppk file (SSH, Auth.) PuTTY 0.70 64-bit Windows 10 run command: ec2-user
